ACT-001.name: get_order_details
ACT-001.description: Retrieves the status and items of a specific order using the order ID.

response_config.template: Your order is currently '{{status}}' and is estimated to be delivered on {{delivery_date}}.
response_config.on_error: Could not find an order with that ID.

ACT-002.name: process_refund
ACT-002.description: Securely processes a refund for a given order.

order_id.description: The ID of the order being refunded.

response_config.on_error: Failed to process the refund securely.

ACT-003.name: search_products
ACT-003.description: Performs a semantic search to find products in the catalog based on a natural language description.

topic.description: What the user is looking for (e.g., 'warm winter jacket')

response_config.template:
Here are the top products I found:
{{value}}
response_config.on_error: I couldn't search the catalog right now.

INT-001.name: create_support_ticket
INT-001.description: Creates a support ticket to connect the customer with a support employee.

title.description: The title of the ticket the user wants to create, leave empty if the user provided no info

description.description: A description of the ticket the user wants to create, leave empty if the user provided no info

INT-002.name: create_technical_ticket
INT-002.description: Creates a technical ticket to report a bug, error or a failure in the system.

title.description: The title of the ticket the user wants to create, leave empty if the user provided no info

description.description: A description of the ticket the user wants to create, leave empty if the user provided no info

INT-003.name: check_ticket_status
INT-003.description: Checks on the status for a specific reported ticket.

ticket_id.description: The ID of the ticket to check status for

INT-004.name: search_tickets
INT-004.description: Searches reported tickets, used to avoid duplication.

query.description: The query to search reported tickets with

INT-005.name: request_confirmation
INT-005.description: Requests confirmation from the user to execute an action.
